snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki

In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. 

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Hydroneer ist ein Sandbox-Mining-Spiel, in dem du nach Gold und anderen Ressourcen gräbst, um gewaltige Bergbaumaschinen und eine Operationsbasis zu errichten. Nutze primitive Werkzeuge, wasserbetriebene Maschinen und von Spielern gebaute Strukturen, um dich in diesem Tycoon-Progressionssystem tief in die Erde zu graben und dein Unternehmen weiterzuentwickeln.

snippet.title: Der Wilde Westen schlägt doppelt zu: Das Double Feature! 🛶 🥾 | Der Schuh & Das Kanu des Manitu
snippet.description:
Ende Juli kehren „Der Schuh des Manitu“ und „Das Kanu des Manitu“ gemeinsam zurück auf die große Leinwand, als exklusives Double Feature! 🤠
Erlebt den Kultklassiker noch einmal im Kino und taucht anschließend direkt in das neue Abenteuer ein. Mehr Wilden Westen, mehr Bully und doppelt so viel Spaß, an einem Abend. Wir sehen uns im Kino! 🍿

#MichaelBullyHerbig #Trailer #Comedy #Kino #SchuhdesManitu #KanudesManitu

Abahachi (Michael Bully Herbig), Häuptling der Apachen, und sein weißer Blutsbruder Ranger (Christian Tramitz) kämpfen wie immer unermüdlich für Frieden und Gerechtigkeit. Doch diesmal wird’s knifflig: Eine neue Bande macht den beiden das Leben schwer und lockt sie mit einem fiesen Trick in die Falle, alles nur, um an das sagenumwobene „Kanu des Manitu“ zu kommen. Zum Glück sind Dimitri (Rick Kavanian), der liebenswerteste Grieche, und seine Mitstreiterin Mary (Jasmin Schwiers), die neue Fachkraft fürs Abenteuerliche, sofort zur Stelle. Gemeinsam retten sie ihre Freunde, oder jedenfalls fast. Denn schnell wird klar: Das Ganze war erst der Auftakt zu einem viel größeren Plan …
Mit vereinten Kräften, und der ein oder anderen Meinungsverschiedenheit, stürzen sich unsere Helden in ihr bisher größtes Abenteuer. Und dabei stoßen sie auf Antworten, die sie so garantiert nicht erwartet hätten.

Abonniere den Kanal hier: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCaNt_KNaF5rvlDMdj-baYWA

snippet.title: Alphaville - Forever Young (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | Alphaville
💿 Canción | Forever Young
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 09/07/2009
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Pop

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"Forever Young" de Alphaville es un himno del synth-pop que reflexiona sobre la juventud, el paso del tiempo y el deseo de vivir intensamente. Con una letra nostálgica y esperanzadora, la canción transmite el anhelo de permanecer joven para siempre mientras invita a valorar cada momento de la vida.

📲 Sígue a "Alphaville" en:
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCObmDvjXCn62yi-aOuGP5Yg

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Verse 1]
Let's dance in style, let's dance for a while
Heaven can wait, we're only watching the skies
Hoping for the best but expecting the worst
Are you gonna drop the bomb or not?
Let us die young or let us live forever
We don't have the power but we never say never
Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip
The music's for the sad man

[Pre-Chorus]
Can you imagine when this race is won?
Turn our golden faces into the sun
Praising our leaders, we're getting in tune
The music's played by the, the mad man

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever young

[Verse 2]
Some are like water, some are like the heat
Some are a melody and some are the beat
Sooner or later, they all will be gone
Why don't they stay young?
It's so hard to get old without a cause
I don't want to perish like a fading horse
Youth's like diamonds in the sun
And diamonds are forever

[Pre-Chorus]
So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We'll let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

[Outro]
Forever young, I wanna be forever young
Do you really want to live forever? (Forever)

#Alphaville #ForeverYoung

snippet.title: The Outlast Trials - Project Boneyard | Cinematic Trailer
snippet.description:
Love. Punishment. Control. While Dr. Easterman believes control comes through reward, Coyle knows it's earned through devotion! 🫀 

🚔 Prepare yourselves to enter Coyle's new Prison Farm in #TheOutlastTrials Project Boneyard update releasing Tuesday July 14th at 10am ET! 

_____________________

Amour. Châtiment. Contrôle. Alors que le Dr Easterman estime que le contrôle s'obtient par la récompense, Coyle sait qu'il se mérite par le dévouement! 🫀 

🚔 Préparez-vous à découvrir la nouvelle ferme-prison de Coyle dans la mise à jour "Project Boneyard" de #TheOutlastTrials, disponible mardi 14 juillet à 10h HE! 

_____________________

▶️ Play The Outlast Trials now on Xbox Series S/X, Xbox One, PlayStation 4, and PlayStation 5 
Steam → https://store.steampowered.com/app/1304930/The_Outlast_Trials/
Epic Games Store → https://store.epicgames.com/en-US/p/the-outlast-trials
PlayStation → https://store.playstation.com/en-ca/product/UP2113-PPSA05003_00-2441492154131447
Xbox → https://www.xbox.com/en-us/games/store/the-outlast-trials/9nr13rf1v2wv

For more about The Outlast Trials and Red Barrels Subscribe to our YouTube channel and follow us:
→ Discord: https://discord.gg/outlastofficial
→ Instagram: https://instagram.com/the.redbarrels/ 
→ Twitter: https://twitter.com/TheRedBarrels
→ Facebook: https://facebook.com/RedBarrels & https://www.facebook.com/Outlastthegame/ 
→ Twitch: https://twitch.tv/theredbarrels/
→ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@the.redbarrels
→ Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/theoutlasttrials.bsky.social & https://bsky.app/profile/redbarrels.bsky.social

The Outlast Trials, is a brand new take on the acclaimed Outlast survival horror series, set in the same terrifying universe as the previous titles, only this time you can choose to play on your own or with friends in a team of up to four people.
